title: Setup Cloudflare tunnel for VictoriaMetrics on vm.clung.us

log.context: Setup Cloudflare tunnel for VictoriaMetrics on vm.clung.us

No DNS record yet. Here's the full summary:

---

**Done on this end:**

- VictoriaMetrics confirmed running on `:8428`
- Added `vm.clung.us → http://localhost:8428` to `/home/clungus/.cloudflared/config.yml`
- Restarted cloudflared — tunnel is active with 4 connections

**One thing jaboostin needs to do:**

Add a DNS CNAME record in Cloudflare dashboard for `vm.clung.us`:
- **Name:** `vm`
- **Target:** `685863fc-3783-4e49-bb8d-6a405c524706.cfargotunnel.com`
- **Proxy:** Proxied (orange cloud)
